content.body:
🎉 **Welcome to MindRoom!**

I'm your routing assistant, here to help coordinate our team of specialized AI agents. 🤖

🧠 **Available agents in this room:**
• **@mindroom_analyst_tests7c:localhost**: Provide analytical insights. (🔧 `calculator`, `scheduler`)
• **@mindroom_code_tests7c:localhost**: Generate code and manage files. (🔧 `file`, `shell`, `scheduler`)
• **@mindroom_general_tests7c:localhost**: A general-purpose assistant. (🔧 `scheduler`)

💬 **How to interact:**
• Mention an agent with @ to get their attention (e.g., @mindroom_assistant)
• Use `!help` to see available commands
• Agents respond in threads; plain replies still continue the same conversation
• Multiple agents can collaborate when you mention them together
• 🎤 Voice messages are automatically transcribed and work perfectly!

⚡ **Quick commands:**
• `!hi` - Show this welcome message again
• `!schedule <time> <message>` - Schedule tasks and reminders
• `!help [topic]` - Get detailed help

✨ Feel free to ask any agent for help or start a conversation!
content.formatted_body:
🎉 Welcome to MindRoom!

I'm your routing assistant, here to help coordinate our team of specialized AI agents. 🤖

🧠 Available agents in this room:
• @AnalystAgent: Provide analytical insights. (🔧 calculator, scheduler)
• @CodeAgent: Generate code and manage files. (🔧 file, shell, scheduler)
• @GeneralAgent: A general-purpose assistant. (🔧 scheduler)

💬 How to interact:
• Mention an agent with @ to get their attention (e.g., @mindroom_assistant)
• Use !help to see available commands
• Agents respond in threads; plain replies still continue the same conversation
• Multiple agents can collaborate when you mention them together
• 🎤 Voice messages are automatically transcribed and work perfectly!

⚡ Quick commands:
• !hi - Show this welcome message again
• !schedule <time> <message> - Schedule tasks and reminders
• !help [topic] - Get detailed help

✨ Feel free to ask any agent for help or start a conversation!
